title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Becton Dickinson India Global Group

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Becton Dickinson India Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Becton Dickinson India Global Group in Varanasi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Becton Dickinson India Global Group:
Becton Dickinson India Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Becton Dickinson India Global Group!
